a4_Gate.buttonStateBoolean: Reads chosen button pin and returns 1 or 0
a4_Gate.displayModulesStates: Displays all gate model's modules' states on the LCD screen
a4_Gate.emitterIR: Reads the IR emitter pin and returns 1 or 0
a4_Gate.gate|param|action: controls dc motor (on or off) and direction of rotation, which sets the gate's action
a4_Gate.getBattery: Returns DFR1216's battery level in percentage
a4_Gate.irDetection: Reads IR sensor's prin and returns 1 or 0
a4_Gate.led: Reads the LED pin and returns 1 or 0
a4_Gate.pirSensor: Reads PIR sensor pin and returns 1 or 0
a4_Gate.sensorState: Reads chosen limit switch pin and returns 1 or 0
